mcpServers._comment: n8n-mcp (czlonkowski/n8n-mcp) exposes node-knowledge tools plus full read-write workflow management via the n8n public REST API. Destructive operations (delete workflow/credential, etc.) are gated by Claude Code approval prompts. Configure N8N_API_URL and N8N_API_KEY in .env (or your shell). Disable by removing this file or commenting the server entry.
